  "findings": [
    "Missing EMT support within 3 feet of the junction box"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install an approved conduit support (such as a one-hole strap or strut clamp) within 3 feet of the box connection before pulling wire or completing the run"
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC Section 358.30(A) requires EMT to be securely fastened in place at least every 10 feet and within 3 feet of each outlet box, junction box, device box, cabinet, conduit body, or other tubing termination. Because the support is missing within 3 feet of the box, the installation is non-compliant and must be corrected before proceeding.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Section 358.30(A)"
  ]
}
